description: ProofX is a content protection service from CyberSecAI Ltd that lets users register and verify ownership of images, videos, audio, and documents using embedded signatures and timestamps. It also offers consumer-facing web, iOS, and browser-extension experiences for protecting and verifying content.
summary: proofx.co.uk publicly exposes a browser-based content verification flow at `/verify`; no public developer API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI documentation was found on the domain.
